creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This appears to be a standard error message and may involve an issue with the configuration.

I note a number of potentially relevant google results for the error message "the renew verb is only capable", including the following which implicates the configuration:

https://community.letsencrypt.org/t/cert-renewal-error/11278/4

Please try to isolate the issue, investigate potential regressions @ the upstream issue tracker and community forums and if possible provide steps to reproduce.
